1- Age requirements

decoder_heading: This Service Is Not Meant For People Under 16
ident_heading: THIS SERVICE IS NOT MEANT FOR PEOPLE UNDER 16
heading_content_part: THIS SERVICE IS NOT MEANT FOR PEOPLE UNDER 16. We are committed to protecting the privacy needs of children and we encourage parents and guardians to take an active role in their children's online activities and interests. We do not knowingly collect information from children under the age of 16 and we do not target this Service to children under 16. If we receive a valid notice through dpo@tasmanic.com that a minor under age of 16 has provided us with personal information, we will take measures to delete it as soon as possible.
2- Why Do we Collect data ?Like most of the other app publishers, Tasmanic Editions needs to perform some

R&D, analysis and marketing tasks. We explain here the reasons why we and our partners may collect data:- Internal analytics and reporting,- Operate our business and app,- App mechanics or functionality,- Maintaining and enhancing service, debugging,- Detecting/Protecting against security event,- Product development/improvement,- Internal research,- Customer service,- User acquisition,- Advertising and direct marketing,
- Detecting/protecting against security events, preventing fraud and abuse of our policies,- Compliance purposes and meeting legal/regulatory requirements.

3- Data that may be collectedWe collect the following categories of your personal information and may sell it to third parties: identifiers, commercial information, internet or other electronic network activity information, geolocation data, and inferences drawn from these categories.App usageExamples: navigation inside the app, actions in the app such as clicks on buttons, duration of sessions, frequency of use... This data is generally analyzed through aggregated reports.Technical Data

Examples: ad identifiers, IP address, device country or language, device screen size, operating system and version...ad identifiers are non-permanent identifiers such as the Android advertising ID and/or Apple's ID for advertising (the â€˜IDFAâ€™), which are uniquely associated with your device.These technologies may allow us and our partners to recognize the users devices, provide interest-based advertising and allow us to understand how the users interact with our app.Messages
If you contact us, for instance by email, we may keep a record of that correspondence.Your interactions with us on our social media channels.

decoder_heading: 4- Data We Don't Collect and Don't Share
ident_heading: 4- Data we don't collect and don't share
heading_content_part: 4- Data we don't collect and don't shareAll the plans, measures, documents titles and folders that you create within the app are only stored on your device. We don't collect information about them and we ensure our partners can't access them.Please take appropriate measures to backup your device frequently because there's no way for us to help you retrieve this data in case a problem occurs (ex: device broken ...)

5- Our PartnersWe currently work with carefully selected and trustful partners. You can opt-out from those partners anytime. See 'opt-out' section.Data Processors:- Firebaselearn moreYou can learn more about the data collectedhere- Tenjinlearn more- GandiIt's our Web hosting service provider.learn more- RevenueCatAllows us to manage the inapp subscriptions.learn more- KochavaAllows us to measure the performance of our ad campaigns.learn more- Adjust

Allows us to measure the performance of our ad campaigns (attribution).learn moreData Controllers:- Googlelearn more- Google Admoblearn moreyou can learn more about theretention policyAdmob works with different partners which may have different policies. You can learn more about them in thecommonly used list- Facebooklearn moreFacebook processes data in order to measure the performance and reach of advertising campaigns and report back insights about the people who saw and interacted with the ads. (

learn more) You can learn more about thedata collected.Please check their policies to know how they manage the data collected.This application runs onARCore, which is provided by Google LLC and governed by the Google Privacy Policy listed above.

6- Opt-outYou can choose to prevent your device's ad identifier being used for interest-based advertising, or you can reset your device's ad identifier, by changing the settings of your device. Seeoptout.networkadvertising.orgfor details.The collection of personal data in the app by Tasmanic Editions and its Analytics & Marketing partners depends on your consent through a 'pop-up' shown at the first launch of the app.

You can give or withdraw your consent at anytime in the app itself : in the menu on the main page, open the 'privacy settings'.You can select 'Option 1' to allow the collection of personal data or 'Option 2' to restrict the collection of personal data.Then force the app to close  (Phone settings => Applications => CamToPlan => Force close)Then restart the app.

You can also contact our partners directly to ask for a full opt out or deletion of your data from their services, with the links provided above. You can also click on the AdChoices logo within an advertisement (where available).

7- PaymentsWe may provide paid products and/or services within the Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors).We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors, whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. The payment processors we work with are:PayPalTheir Privacy Policy can be viewedhereApple Store In-App Payments

heading_content_part: 9- CCPA Consumer Rights (Additional California Privacy Rights)This section provides additional details for California consumers about the rights afforded to them under the California Consumer Privacy Act or 'CCPA'.California Children Under 16THIS SERVICE IS NOT MEANT FOR CALIFORNIA-LOCATED PEOPLE UNDER 16.Your Rights Regarding Personal Information.

decoder_heading: 9- CCPA Consumer Rights (Additional California Privacy Rights)
ident_heading: 9- CCPA Consumer Rights (Additional California Privacy Rights)
heading_content_part: Under the California Consumer Privacy Act of 2018 ('the CCPA'), California consumers have the right to request access to the specific pieces of personal information we have collected about them in the last 12 months. You may also request additional details about our information practices, including the categories of personal information we have collected about you, the categories of sources of such collection, the business or commercial purpose for collecting personal information, the categories of third parties with whom we share your personal information, the categories of personal information we have disclosed about you in the preceding 12 months. If you are a California consumer, you also have the right to request deletion of your personal information (subject to certain exceptions), to opt out of sales of personal information and to receive equal service and price and not be discriminated against even if you exercise any of their other CCPA rights.
